name: @code-yeongyu/lazyz-work-status
description: LazyZ component that reports in-progress start-work / ulw-loop state: resume prompts on SessionStart, progress counts on demand, init-deep suggestions, and local MCP build-missing warnings.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && bun build src/cli.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/cli.js
